objective: Stratégie sur FDUSDUSDC 1h. Sur le token "DOGEUSDT" en timeframe "1h", l'objectif est de tester la performance d'une combinaison inhabituelle d'indicateurs, incluant ROC et EMA sur un axe 'hors sentiers battus', à savoir une gestion du risque non lineaire basée sur le ratio SL/TP adapté aux variations volatiles. Le signal sera validé par une confirmation contrarienne partielle (mode_counter_consensus), tout en privilégiant des paires d'indicateurs raresment combinées (mode_offbeat). Le risque management est un stop loss à la volatilité maximale divisant le TP, qui sera ajusté dynamiquement selon les variations de volatilité.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the Bollinger band and RSI with ATR based risk management improves performance in trending markets while reducing drawdown in ranging markets.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy combines Bollinger Bands, RSI with ATR based risk management to identify potential trade opportunities. The use of contrarian partial confirmation and mode offbeat pairs can result in rare but potentially profitable combinations. The SL/TP ratio is adjusted dynamically according to volatility changes. However, the effectiveness of this strategy may be limited during high volatility periods or when market conditions are not trending. A mediocre Sharpe ratio suggests room for improvement in risk-reward optimization. If results are poor, a potential change could involve increasing stop loss levels to better manage drawdown risks and refining RSI signals by considering multiple timeframes.
[Backup plan] 1) Increase the number of indicators used or explore other non-linear risk management techniques such as dynamic hedging. 2) Test different volatility measures and adjust SL/TP based on those measures. 3) Incorporate additional market conditions (e.g., mean reversion) to broaden strategy applicability.
